examples: The back story about Glass's love for a Pawnee woman is fiction.
Leslie Knope tried to promote the Pawnee Zoo by having a fake marriage of two new penguins, but things got controversial when it turned out they were both male.
Unfortunately, Pawnee voters have few good options in this fictional election.
The heat has been so extreme that a portion of the Cimarron Turnpike in Pawnee County, Oklahoma, buckled on Sunday, creating a 2-foot ramp that sent a motorcyclist flying 150 feet through the air.
